idea-plugin.name: FAH Failure Sound
idea-plugin.description:
### Hear feedback instantly
**FAH Failure Sound** plays configurable audio for key IntelliJ events, so you can stay focused on code instead of constantly watching output tabs.
### Supported events
- Build: `failed`, `warning`, `succeeded` - Run/Debug: `failed`, `succeeded` - External tools: `Gradle failed`, `Maven failed`
### What you can customize
- Per-event sound source (`bundled`, `custom`, `no sound`) - Per-event max playback duration (`Max ms`) - Global volume and debounce - Optional IDE notifications - Custom `.mp3` and `.wav` files from your IDE config folder
Built for faster feedback loops while coding.
